tags.qa_notes: Re-audited 2026-05-24. validation_source reformatted to domain names. Tobago Cays Marine Park confirmed. Horseshoe Reef confirmed. Hawksbill turtles confirmed as defining feature of TCMP. Depth 12m confirmed as max for Horseshoe Reef.

Re-audited 2026-05-24. validation_source reformatted to domain names. Wall dive at southern tip of Bequia (West Cay) confirmed by Dive Bequia and ZuBlu. Coordinate confidence medium - geographic inference from West Cay. Depth 30m confirmed as Advanced.

Re-audited 2026-05-24. validation_source reformatted to domain names. Anchor Reef confirmed by Dive St Vincent: starts at 30ft (9m), drops to 120ft (36m) wall with swim-throughs and 18th century anchor. Located north of Layou on leeward coast.

Re-audited 2026-05-24. validation_source reformatted to domain names. Named for bottles tossed from Fort Charlotte cliffs above (confirmed by Dive St Vincent). Located below Fort Charlotte on leeward coast. Max depth reported as 22-25m depending on source.

Re-audited 2026-05-24. validation_source reformatted to domain names. Originally had only 1 source (Zentacle). Koordinate confirmed via Zentacle (13.167768, -61.218219). Also known as Questelles Reef. Located near Questelles on leeward coast.

Re-audited 2026-05-24. validation_source reformatted to domain names. PADI dive site database confirms coordinates (13.129897, -61.203600). Muck dive site in shadow of Fort Duvernette near Young Island confirmed. Flying gurnards, frogfish, seahorses confirmed as target species on volcanic sand bottom.

Re-audited 2026-05-24. validation_source reformatted to domain names. Coordinates confirmed via Diveboard (12.6366, -61.3884). Expansive coral reef between Tobago Cays and Mayreau confirmed. Drift dive character, crinoids, garden eels, flamingo tongues confirmed.

Re-audited 2026-05-24. validation_source reformatted to domain names. PSV Resort dive center confirmed. Reef on leeward (west) side of Petit St. Vincent island. Coordinate is geographic inference from island coordinates - confidence medium.

Re-audited 2026-05-24. validation_source reformatted to domain names. Sloping reef with spotted drums and banded coral shrimp confirmed. Diving based at Endeavour Bay on west/leeward coast. Coordinate confidence medium - geographic inference from Mustique west coast.

Re-audited 2026-05-24. validation_source reformatted to domain names. Coordinates confirmed by Zentacle (13.187933, -61.269167) and Wannadive (13d11.276'N, 61d16.15'W). Half-submerged cave with colony of bats confirmed. Rocky passageway through reef into cliff cave. Surge-affected, rated Advanced.
